response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of software development experience, satisfying the tenure minimum, with strong full-stack breadth, open-source leadership (GISCollective), and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level individual contributor focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows a career trajectory at the senior/staff engineer level without evidence of engineering leadership at scale, recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, cloud platform strategy work, or advising strategic customers. The gap between the role's seniority and AI-strategy focus and the candidate's hands-on generalist profile is substantial.
strengths: ~19 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform with sustained ownership since 2016, plus conference talks and workshops
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise, AI products at scale, or advanced degree in an AI-related field
Career level is senior/staff IC; no evidence of principal-level scope, engineering leadership, or strategic advisory work
Limited cloud platform strategy experience — cloud usage is operational (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than product/strategy oriented

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products
Meets 15-year experience minimum with broad technical range
